mapper.sql: select id, name, code, category_id, domain, site_type, site_function_type, setup_status, template_id, logo_url, favicon_url, description, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, config, storage_config_id, default_locale, supported_locales, i18n_mode, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from gb_sites
mapper.insert: insert ignore into gb_user_site_relation (user_id, site_id, is_default) values (#{userId}, #{siteId}, #{isDefault})
mapper.select: SELECT r.user_id FROM gb_user_site_relation r WHERE r.site_id = #{siteId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT r.site_id FROM gb_user_site_relation r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_default = 1 LIMIT 1), (SELECT r.site_id FROM gb_user_site_relation r INNER JOIN gb_sites s ON s.id = r.site_id AND s.is_personal = 1 AND s.del_flag = '0' WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1) )
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_sites
name, code, category_id, domain, site_type, logo_url, favicon_url, description, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, config, storage_config_id, default_locale, supported_locales, i18n_mode, is_personal, site_function_type, setup_status, template_id, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{name}, #{code}, #{categoryId}, #{domain}, #{siteType}, #{logoUrl}, #{faviconUrl}, #{description}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoKeywords}, #{seoDescription}, #{config}, #{storageConfigId}, #{defaultLocale}, #{supportedLocales}, #{i18nMode}, #{isPersonal}, #{siteFunctionType}, #{setupStatus}, #{templateId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update gb_sites set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_sites set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
